licence: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, as displayed by Kaggle metadata; terms require review before redistribution
attribution: Petro Ivaniuk, Football - FIFA World Cup dataset on Kaggle
redistributionStatus: Raw CSV excluded from Git; redistribution is not approved pending licence and attribution review
sourceVersionBasis: No official dataset version manifest accompanied the local file. The filesystem timestamp is not treated as dataset provenance.
notes: accessDate is the local validation date, not the unknown original download date.
The checksum and file size identify the exact unmodified local snapshot validated by the offline adapter.
Detailed source event columns are preserved as raw strings and are not interpreted by the historical match adapter.
